description:
Description

The Nike Crew Socks provide comfort and sweat-wicking technology to help keep your little one cool at play.
features: 76% Cotton 16% Polyester 6% Nylon 2% Spandex 6 Pair | Shoe Size - Boys Medium Enhanced fit with mid-foot arch compression.
Reinforced heel and toe for enhanced durability.
Moisture-wicking cotton keep feet dry and comfortable.
Cushioned terry foot for comfort and shock absorption.
parentTitle: Nike Little Boy Cushioned Crew Socks 6 Pack
title: Nike Boys Crew Socks - 6 Pair Black
